name: hole
hints: You're in a hole dug from the field above. You can dig deeper.
DIG to go further underground. UP returns to the field (room 4).
DIG continues downward. UP returns to field (room 4). Items dropped from digging above may be here.
notes: Hole below field (room 4). DIG goes deeper. UP returns to the field. Items dropped when digging from above land here.
